About Us

A sourcing partner built on transparency and consistency

Viva Global Commerce is an Indian export company committed to supplying high-quality agricultural, forest, handcrafted, and natural products to international buyers. We are building long-term relationships through quality products, transparent communication, ethical business practices, and reliable global logistics.

Based in Balaghat, Madhya Pradesh — a region close to India's agricultural and forest belts — we work directly with growers and artisans to keep our supply chain honest and our pricing competitive. Mahua, in particular, is a local specialty of our home region — giving us close, direct access that few exporters can match. Our vision is straightforward: become a trusted global sourcing partner, one shipment at a time.

What we stand for

Products

Sourced from India's growers and processors

Six core categories covering seeds, spices, pulses, herbal roots, and regional specialties — each backed by a network of trusted regional suppliers.

Amaranth Seeds

A highly nutritious ancient grain valued as a modern superfood, naturally gluten-free and rich in protein.

Flax Seeds

Also known as linseed, flax is a fibre-rich oilseed prized for its omega-3 content across food and nutraceutical uses.

Quinoa Seeds

A small, protein-packed grain-like seed that has become a global health-food staple for its complete amino acid profile.

Chia Seeds

Sourced from the Salvia hispanica plant, chia seeds are known for their high omega-3 and fibre content.

Basil Seeds

Resembling sesame in appearance, basil seeds swell to a gel-like texture and are popular in health drinks and desserts.

Natural Sesame Seeds

One of the oldest cultivated oilseeds in the world, valued for their nutty flavour and high oil content.

Hulled Sesame Seeds

Sesame seeds with the outer husk removed for a lighter colour, milder taste, and easier digestibility.

Soybean Seeds

A versatile legume native to East Asia, widely used for oil extraction, animal feed, and food processing.

Soybean Plant Nutrient

Mechanically processed soybean meal that retains high plant-protein value, suited to feed and nutrition applications.

Black Cumin Seeds

Derived from Nigella sativa, these seeds carry a distinctive peppery aroma used in cooking and traditional wellness.

Cumin Seeds

A kitchen staple across global cuisines, cumin seeds bring a warm, earthy aroma to spice blends, chutneys, and curries.

Fennel Seeds

Sweet and aromatic, fennel seeds are used in spice blends, herbal teas, and traditional after-meal preparations.

Coriander Seeds

Available whole or ground, coriander seeds add a citrusy, mild warmth that anchors many spice blends.

Ajwain (Carom Seeds)

A pungent, thyme-like spice widely used in Indian cooking and traditional home remedies.

Fenugreek Seeds

A slightly bitter, aromatic seed used across Indian and Middle Eastern kitchens, also valued for its nutritional profile.

Black/Brown Mustard Seeds

Small, strong-flavoured seeds that form the base of tempering and pickling across South Asian cooking.

Yellow Mustard Seeds

Milder than their black counterpart, yellow mustard seeds are used in condiments, pickling, and spice blends worldwide.

Turmeric Finger

Whole, unprocessed turmeric root, valued for its high curcumin content and use in medicine, food, and natural dyeing.

Turmeric Powder

Finely ground turmeric with a warm colour and earthy flavour, a kitchen and wellness staple across the world.

Chickpeas

Also known as garbanzo beans or Bengal gram, chickpeas are a nutrient-dense legume grown widely across central India.

Pulses & Lentils

A broad family of dried legumes — a dietary staple prized for protein content and long shelf life.

Groundnut (Peanut)

Grown widely across central India, groundnuts are valued for oil extraction, snacking, and food processing.

Rice

Premium Indian rice varieties, sorted and graded to meet the specifications of international buyers.

Psyllium Seeds (Isabgol)

Derived from the Plantago ovata plant, psyllium seeds are a natural source of soluble fibre, known in India as isabgol.

Psyllium Husk Powder

The ground husk of psyllium seeds, widely used as a natural fibre supplement and food thickener.

Ashwagandha Powder

A cornerstone herb of Ayurvedic tradition, ashwagandha root is dried and ground for wellness and nutraceutical use.

Shatavari (Indian Asparagus)

A traditional Ayurvedic root, valued in herbal wellness formulations across India and beyond.

Safed Musli

A prized Ayurvedic root known for its use in traditional tonics and herbal supplement formulations.

Dehydrated Onion

Onion flakes, minced, and powder forms — dried for extended shelf life without compromising flavour.

Local Specialty

Dried Mahua

Forest-collected mahua flowers from our home region of Balaghat, sun-dried and cleaned — a genuine local specialty.

Looking for something not listed? We can source many other Indian products based on buyer requirements — share your specification and we'll confirm sourcing feasibility.

Why Choose Us

What working with us looks like

01

Premium Quality Products

Every consignment checked against buyer specification before dispatch.

02

Reliable Supplier Network

Direct relationships with growers, foragers and artisan clusters.

03

Competitive Pricing

Regional sourcing keeps costs lean without cutting quality.

04

Timely Delivery

Realistic timelines communicated upfront and tracked through dispatch.

05

Export Documentation Support

Guidance through the paperwork your shipment needs.

06

Customized Packaging

Packaging adapted to your market, brand and shipping method.

07

Transparent Communication

Clear updates at every stage, with no surprises.

08

Dedicated Customer Support

A single point of contact from inquiry through delivery.

Export Process

From first inquiry to delivery

01

Product Inquiry

You reach out with the product and market you're sourcing for.

02

Requirement Discussion

We clarify specification, quantity, destination and timeline.

03

Quotation

A clear, itemised quote is shared for your review.

04

Sample Approval

Samples are arranged so you can confirm quality before ordering.

05

Order Confirmation

Terms are finalised and the order is confirmed in writing.

06

Production & Quality Inspection

Goods are prepared and checked against agreed specification.

07

Export Documentation

Invoices, certificates and shipping paperwork are prepared.

08

Shipping

Cargo is booked and dispatched via the agreed shipping mode.

09

Delivery Support

We stay in contact through transit until goods reach you.
